eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 10:25 AM on JUL 31, 2019 Effective until 10:40 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Carson City authorities have issued a required weekly test for Douglas County, Carson City, Storey County, Lyon County and Alpine County. This is only a test. No action required.
